# Tokio Capability Evidence Map

**Bead**: `asupersync-2oh2u.1.1.2` ([T1.1.b])
**Generated by**: SapphireHill (claude-code / opus-4.6)
**Date**: 2026-03-03
**Parent inventory**: `docs/tokio_ecosystem_capability_inventory.md` (T1.1.a)
**Purpose**: Map every capability family to concrete source modules, Cargo
features, docs, test suites, and evidence pointers so claims are auditable
and machine-checkable.

---

## 1. Evidence Key

Each row contains:

- **Src**: Source module paths (relative to `src/`)
- **Features**: Cargo feature flags (from `Cargo.toml [features]`)
- **Tests (inline)**: `#[cfg(test)]` modules within source files
- **Tests (integration)**: Files in `tests/` directory
- **Tests (conformance)**: Files in `conformance/src/tests/`
- **Docs**: Documentation files in `docs/`
- **Formal**: Lean/TLA+ proofs in `formal/`
- **Test count**: Approximate total test function count (inline + integration + conformance)

Counts are approximate (±10%) from automated `#[test]`/`#[cfg(test)]` scanning.

---

## 2. Evidence Matrix

### F01 — Core Runtime and Task Execution

| Axis | Evidence |
|------|----------|
| Src | `runtime/state.rs`, `runtime/scheduler/{work_steal.rs,local_queue.rs,global_queue.rs}`, `runtime/builder.rs`, `runtime/blocking_pool.rs`, `runtime/io_driver.rs`, `runtime/waker.rs`, `runtime/timer.rs`, `runtime/stored_task.rs`, `runtime/task_handle.rs`, `runtime/task_table.rs`, `runtime/spawn_blocking.rs`, `runtime/yield_now.rs`, `runtime/local.rs`, `runtime/config.rs`, `runtime/env_config.rs`, `runtime/mod.rs` |
| Features | `test-internals` (exposes `Cx::new()` for testing) |
| Tests (inline) | `runtime/state.rs`, `runtime/scheduler/*.rs`, `runtime/blocking_pool.rs`, `runtime/io_driver.rs`, `runtime/local.rs`, `runtime/task_table.rs` |
| Tests (integration) | `tests/runtime_e2e.rs`, `tests/scheduler_loom.rs`, `tests/scheduler_regression.rs`, `tests/scheduler_stress_fairness_e2e.rs`, `tests/scheduler_lane_fairness.rs`, `tests/scheduler_backoff.rs`, `tests/scheduler_browser_determinism.rs` |
| Tests (conformance) | `conformance/src/tests/runtime.rs` (10 tests) |
| Docs | `docs/benchmarking.md` |
| Test count | ~1,100 |

### F02 — Structured Concurrency and Cancellation Protocol

| Axis | Evidence |
|------|----------|
| Src | `cx/cx.rs`, `cx/scope.rs`, `cx/cap.rs`, `cx/registry.rs`, `cx/wrappers.rs`, `cancel/symbol_cancel.rs`, `cancel/progress_certificate.rs`, `obligation/{leak_check,ledger,marking,recovery,saga,session_types,dialectica,graded,guarded,eprocess,calm,crdt,lyapunov,separation_logic,no_leak_proof,no_aliasing_proof}.rs`, `record/{region,task,obligation,finalizer,distributed_region,symbol_obligation_tracker,symbolic_obligation}.rs` |
| Features | (core, always compiled) |
| Tests (inline) | All source files above contain `#[cfg(test)]` modules |
| Tests (integration) | `tests/cancellation_conformance.rs`, `tests/cancel_attribution.rs`, `tests/cancel_obligation_invariants.rs`, `tests/cancel_lane_fairness_bounds.rs`, `tests/cancellation_stress_e2e.rs`, `tests/property_cancellation.rs`, `tests/close_quiescence_regression.rs`, `tests/cap_obligation_compile_fail.rs` |
| Tests (conformance) | `conformance/src/tests/cancellation.rs` (7 tests) |
| Docs | `docs/asupersync_v4_formal_semantics.md`, `docs/cancellation-testing.md` |
| Formal | `formal/lean/Asupersync.lean` (170 theorems covering all 6 core invariants), `formal/tla/` |
| Test count | ~1,070 |

| Features | (core) |
| Tests (inline) | All HTTP source files |
| Tests (integration) | `tests/http_e2e.rs`, `tests/http_verification.rs`, `tests/http_shutdown_test.rs`, `tests/http_h1_client_regression.rs` |
| Test count | ~717 |

### F15 — QUIC + HTTP/3

| Axis | Evidence |
|------|----------|
| Src | `net/quic/{connection,stream,config}.rs`, `net/quic_core/`, `net/quic_native/`, `http/h3/`, `http/h3_native.rs` |
| Features | `quic`, `http3` (native Tokio-free surfaces); `quic-compat`, `http3-compat` (legacy wrapper surfaces, off by default) |
| Tests (inline) | Source files in quic_native, quic_core, h3_native |
| Tests (integration) | `tests/quic_h3_e2e.rs`, `tests/quic_h3_e2e_cancel.rs`, `tests/quic_h3_e2e_loss.rs`, `tests/quic_h3_e2e_h3.rs`, `tests/quic_h3_e2e_violations.rs` |
| Test count | ~472 |
| Notes | T4.2/T4.3 transport parity is closed across handshake lifecycle, stream transitions, loss-recovery, close semantics, and flow/congestion stress correctness (see `net/quic_native/{connection,transport}.rs` plus violation/loss E2E suites). T4.4 extends this with native key-update lifecycle coverage and explicit 0-RTT/resumption + migration guard paths (`enable_resumption_0rtt`, `request_path_migration`, `set_active_migration_disabled`) exercised in `tests/quic_h3_e2e.rs`. T4.5 extends native H3/QPACK integration with validated decode helpers (`qpack_decode_request_field_section`, `qpack_decode_response_field_section`) and malformed peer pseudo-header ordering coverage in `tests/quic_h3_e2e_violations.rs` (`h3_qpack_request_pseudo_after_regular_header_is_rejected`). T4.8 extends `net/quic_native/forensic_log.rs` with cancellation/region correlation signals (`CancelRequested`, `RegionStateChanged`, `cancel_region_summary`) for deterministic incident forensics and replay triage. RFC 9002 remains partially implemented beyond this closure; compatibility wrappers remain explicitly separated and disabled by default. |

## 3. Cross-Cutting Evidence

### 3.1 Formal Verification

| Domain | Artifact | Theorems |
|--------|----------|----------|
| Cancellation protocol | `formal/lean/Asupersync.lean` | 170 theorems (6 core invariants fully proven) |
| Scheduler correctness | `formal/tla/` | TLC model checking (6 scenarios S1-S6) |
| Docs-to-spec alignment | `docs/semantic_docs_rule_mapping.md` | 45 mapped rule IDs |
| Traceability matrix | `docs/semantic_inventory_lean.md` | 136 traceability rows |

### 3.2 Conformance Suite

| File | Domain | Tests |
|------|--------|-------|
| `conformance/src/tests/budget.rs` | Budget/deadline system | 22 |
| `conformance/src/tests/outcome.rs` | Outcome types | 20 |
| `conformance/src/tests/runtime.rs` | Runtime lifecycle | 10 |
| `conformance/src/tests/cancellation.rs` | Cancellation protocol | 7 |
| `conformance/src/tests/io.rs` | Async I/O | 7 |
| `conformance/src/tests/channels.rs` | Channel primitives | (integration) |
| `conformance/src/tests/negative.rs` | Negative/failure cases | (integration) |

### 3.3 CI / Quality Gates

| Gate | Command | Scope |
|------|---------|-------|
| Compile check | `cargo check --all-targets` | All code |
| Clippy lint | `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` | All code |
| Format check | `cargo fmt --check` | All code |
| Unit tests | `cargo test --lib` | Library tests |
| Integration tests | `cargo test --test <name>` | Per-suite |
| Conformance | `cargo test -p asupersync-conformance` | Conformance crate |

### 3.4 Workspace Crates

| Crate | Path | Role |
|-------|------|------|
| `asupersync` | `.` | Main runtime crate |
| `asupersync-macros` | `asupersync-macros/` | Proc macros (`scope!`, `spawn!`) |
| `asupersync-conformance` | `conformance/` | Conformance test suite + reports |
| `frankenlab` | `frankenlab/` | Extended lab/test infrastructure |
| `franken_kernel` | `franken_kernel/` | FrankenSuite kernel types |
| `franken_evidence` | `franken_evidence/` | Evidence ledger |
| `franken_decision` | `franken_decision/` | Decision contracts |

## 4. Summary Statistics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Capability families mapped | 28 |
| Total test count (approx) | ~8,000+ |
| Families with 500+ tests | 5 (F01, F02, F14, F26, F27) |
| Families with integration tests | 25 of 28 |
| Families with conformance tests | 5 of 28 |
| Families with formal proofs | 1 (F02 — 170 theorems) |
| Feature flags mapped | 17 |
| External dependency mappings | 15 |
| Families with zero evidence gap | 24 |
| Families needing evidence expansion | 4 (F07, F08, F11, F22) |

### Evidence Gaps Requiring Attention

| Family | Gap |
|--------|-----|
| F07 (Codec) | Low integration test coverage; needs dedicated conformance tests |
| F08 (Bytes) | No integration tests; all tests are inline |
| F11 (DNS) | Low test count; no integration tests; needs resolver conformance suite |
| F22 (Process) | Only 17 tests; needs robust lifecycle and cancellation testing |
| F28 (Interop) | No dedicated module or tests; entirely planned work |
